biological_replicate: we created H4 cell lines stably expressing GFP-BAG5 or GFP as a negative control.
technical_replicate: 100 μL of cells were transferred in triplicate to an opaque flat-bottomed 96-well plate.
experimental_design: To investigate the functional consequences of the interaction between BAG5 and p62.
factor_value: the interaction between BAG5 and p62.
number_of_fractions: no fractionation or pre-fractionation is described.
number_of_technical_replicates: 100 μL of cells were transferred in triplicate.
number_of_samples: 1 biological replicate (H4 cells) and no fractions described.
